title: Spooky Voices
description: Spooky voices for your MC world resource pack.
body:
A fun sound pack that has voice-acting sounds and effects added to various common mobs found in Minecraft vanilla.

This is a work in progress resource pack that brings a different, albeit weird, experience.  Development is sporadic, but feel free to comment on the Youtube video if there are any specific desires for new mob sounds!

List of different voices included currently:
- Zombie Mob Voices
- Villager Mob Voices
- Pig Voices
- Zombie Villager Voices
- Ghast Moan Voices
- Ghast Scream Voices + Effects on Moan
- Endermen Voices (inspired by No Face!)
- Skeleton Voices
- Creeper & Spider Voices, modified Endermen voices
- Witch Voices

A quick limited preview of some of the sounds (so you don't get too many spoilers!):
